subject: Release runtime-api 1.1.1
commit_message:
Release runtime-api 1.1.1

Update bpgenerator after refactor.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2529
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ieb70b7ca3a4b4cb485fa29710c84a66923e10bd0

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Verified in Nokia's lab deployment of:
- ves collector using DCAEMOD (with dmaapplugin flag set to false)
- datafile collector (with dmaapplugin flag set to true)

After that I sent notification event to the VES and it was correctly read by the DFC and published to DataRouter.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-platform-release-verify/47/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/dcaegen2-platform-release-verify/47

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

Thanks for confirming results of test
Change has been successfully merged by Vijay Venkatesh Kumar

Patch Set 1:

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-platform-release-merge/32/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/dcaegen2-platform-release-merge/32

Patch Set 1:

Missed noticing that we already have 1.1.1 version under guilin branch hence this release job will likely fail.

Remi - Lets bump the master version to 1.2.0 and re-release runtimeapi container.

Patch Set 1:

Just FYI, though job passed - the new container was not released.. At this stage, no point reverting this commit - lets proceed with 1.2.0 update and re-release.

10:51:47 INFO: 1.1.1 is already released for image org.onap.dcaegen2.platform.mod.runtime-web, Continuing...

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Missed noticing that we already have 1.1.1 version under guilin branch hence this release job will likely fail.
> 
> Remi - Lets bump the master version to 1.2.0 and re-release runtimeapi container.

It says it's successful, but I double checked it and it looks like it stopped before pushing anything, so we are good. I will prepare the bump in a moment
